title: Dubai Airport issues warning over fabricated, digitally altered videos circulating online
summary_full: Dubai International Airport has issued a warning regarding digitally manipulated videos falsely depicting incidents at the airport. Authorities urge the public to rely on official updates and refrain from sharing unverified content, emphasizing potential legal consequences under UAE regulations for spreading misinformation.
